subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Zaynu'l-Muqarrabin(?)
subcodes.first_line: O Zaynu'l-Muqarrabin! Know thou that whatsoever thou hast heard concerning this Cause hath appeared through My mighty and powerful Command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا زین المقربین فاعلم بان کل ما سمعت فی هذالامر قد ظهر بامری العزیز المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @chastisement and requital, @power of faith; power of the spirit, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
